note: Drift-check suppression list — read ONLY by scripts/kb_drift.py, never by the scanner. 'aliases' maps a litellm route name to the bundled provider id it denotes (target must exist in providers.json; validated at run time). 'ignore' marks upstream names that are not AI model providers, each with a reason. 'sdk_exempt' records bundled providers with no official Java/.NET SDK to add (id → reason). Every entry is a human judgment recorded via PR.

sdk_exempt.ai21: Python/TS-only vendor, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.alibaba_dashscope: official SDKs are Python + Java only; .NET usage rides the OpenAI-compatible endpoint
sdk_exempt.baseten: Python/TS-only vendor, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.black_forest_labs: API-first vendor; Python/JS clients only, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.cerebras: Python/TS-only vendor, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.cohere: no official .NET SDK (official SDKs: Python, TS, Java, Go)
sdk_exempt.databricks: no official .NET SDK (official SDKs: Python, Go, Java)
sdk_exempt.deepgram: no official Java SDK (official SDKs: Python, JS, .NET, Go)
sdk_exempt.deepinfra: Python/TS-only vendor, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.deepseek: no official SDKs at all — OpenAI-compatible endpoint only (npm key is the community @ai-sdk/deepseek)
sdk_exempt.elevenlabs: no official Java SDK on Maven (only third-party clients)
sdk_exempt.fal_ai: Python/TS-only vendor, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.fireworks_ai: Python/TS-only vendor, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.friendliai: Python/JS-only vendor, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.groq: official SDKs: Python, JS — no Java/.NET
sdk_exempt.hf_transformers_local: local Python library — no Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.huggingface: no official Java SDK; Java usage rides the OpenAI-compatible endpoint
sdk_exempt.langchain: Python/JS only; LangChain4j and LangChain.NET are separate community projects
sdk_exempt.lemonade: local Python tool (AMD) — no Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.litellm: Python SDK + proxy; no official Java/.NET client SDK
sdk_exempt.llama_index: Python/TS-only framework, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.mistral: official SDKs: Python, TS — no Java/.NET
sdk_exempt.modelscope: Python-first hub; no official Java/.NET SDK for the inference API
sdk_exempt.nlp_cloud: Python/JS-only vendor, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.openrouter: router used via OpenAI SDKs; no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.perplexity: Python/TS-only vendor, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.qdrant: no official Java client (official clients: Python, TS, Rust, Go, .NET)
sdk_exempt.replicate: official SDKs: Python, JS, Go — no Java/.NET
sdk_exempt.runwayml: Python/TS-only vendor, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.sarvam: Python/JS-only vendor, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.snowflake: Cortex reached via generic Snowflake drivers (JDBC/Python connector) — no dedicated AI SDK for Java/.NET
sdk_exempt.together_ai: Python/TS-only vendor, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.volcengine: no official .NET SDK (official SDKs: Python, Go, Java)
sdk_exempt.voyage: Python/TS-only vendor, no official Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.watsonx: no official .NET SDK (official SDKs: Python, Node, Java, Go)
sdk_exempt.weaviate: no official .NET client (official clients: Python, JS/TS, Go, Java)
sdk_exempt.whisper_local: local Python tooling — no Java/.NET SDK
sdk_exempt.xai: official SDKs: Python, TS — no Java/.NET
sdk_exempt.zhipu: no official Java/.NET SDK verified (official: Python, JS)

ignore.apiserpent: SERP/search API wrapper, no model weights (judged 2026-07-05)
ignore.darkbloom: no public record (reviewed 2026-07-05: nothing actionable in the current list; revisit on new information)
ignore.dataforseo: SEO/SERP data API, not an AI model provider (judged 2026-07-05)
ignore.duckduckgo: web-search route, not an AI model provider (judged 2026-07-05)
ignore.exa_ai: web-search API, not an AI model provider (judged 2026-07-05)
ignore.google_pse: Google Programmable Search Engine, search-only route (judged 2026-07-05)
ignore.linkup: web-search API, not an AI model provider (judged 2026-07-05)
ignore.llamagate: open-model gateway, HQ unverifiable (reviewed 2026-07-05: nothing actionable in the current list; revisit on new information)
ignore.morph: researched (Morph, SF) — deliberately not added this pass (reviewed 2026-07-05: nothing actionable in the current list; revisit on new information)
ignore.one of https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/prov: placeholder junk entry in the upstream price file (judged 2026-07-05)
ignore.parallel_ai: Parallel Web Systems — web search/research APIs for agents, no model weights (judged 2026-07-05)
ignore.pinstripes: no public record (litellm v1.90 addition, undocumented) (reviewed 2026-07-05: nothing actionable in the current list; revisit on new information)
ignore.reducto: researched (Reducto document AI, SF) — deliberately not added this pass (reviewed 2026-07-05: nothing actionable in the current list; revisit on new information)
ignore.serper: Google SERP API, not an AI model provider (judged 2026-07-05)
ignore.tavily: web-search API, not an AI model provider (judged 2026-07-05)
ignore.tensormesh: researched (Tensormesh, SF) — deliberately not added this pass (reviewed 2026-07-05: nothing actionable in the current list; revisit on new information)
ignore.text-completion-inception: researched (Inception Labs, Palo Alto) — deliberately not added this pass (reviewed 2026-07-05: nothing actionable in the current list; revisit on new information)
ignore.tinyfish: TinyFish — enterprise web-agent automation infra, no model weights (judged 2026-07-05)
ignore.you_com: litellm routes You.com as web search, not model serving (judged 2026-07-05)
